app.title: Paper Football
app.subtitle: Score a goal in your opponent's net. Bouncing off a wall or an occupied dot lets you keep playing.
status.reasonBlock: opponent is blocked — no legal move!
end.subBlock: Opponent is blocked — no legal move.
rules.title: Rules
rules.rule1: 1. One line per turn — from the ball to an adjacent dot, straight or diagonal.
rules.rule2: 2. No line twice — lines never repeat; you can't slide along the wall.
rules.rule3: 3. Bounce = extra move — landing on an occupied dot or a wall → you move again.
rules.rule4: 4. End of game — first goal wins. Whoever gets blocked (no legal move on their turn) loses.
rules.intro: The blue player (You) shoots into the top goal; the red player (Bot) shoots into the bottom.
